texto: I have more enemies than I deserve," I said. "I am fighting a losing battle, me against the world. The next century is at stake. Time is running out and my optimism is sorely strained.""Yeah?" he said. "I was young once too.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Felix Gilman que provoca passagem do tempo e prioridades. Ao questionar “I have more enemies than I deserve," I said. "I am fighting a losing battle, me against the world…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre tempo, optimism, youth, com foco em dia-chuvoso e youth.

frase_original: I have more enemies than I deserve," I said. "I am fighting a losing battle, me against the world. The next century is at stake. Time is running out and my optimism is sorely strained.""Yeah?" he said. "I was young once too.
